name: coTfsSDOChkForUnexpectedAbort
title: coTfsSDOChkForUnexpectedAbort
description: This functions checks for unexpected SDO abort codes that are not in the list of accepted SDO abort codes. Therefore the function compares the list of received SDO abort codes with the list of accepted SDO abort codes.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
